zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah FitzHugh於大約1167年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，她的父親Fitzhugh33歲，母親Mrs Fitzhugh29歲。她於1190年與William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan在英國蘇格蘭希倫德巴登結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1254年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登享年89歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah FitzHugh于大约1167年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，她的父亲Fitzhugh33岁，母亲Mrs Fitzhugh29岁。她于1190年与William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan在英国苏格兰希倫德巴登结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1254年在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登享年89岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah FitzHugh was born about 1167, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Fitzhugh, was 33 and her mother, Mrs Fitzhugh, was 29. She married William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan in 1190, in Badenoch, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1254, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 89, and was buried in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah FitzHugh est née environ 1167, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fitzhugh, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs Fitzhugh, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan en 1190, à Badenoch, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1254, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah FitzHugh um 1167 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fitzhugh 33 und ihre Mutter Mrs Fitzhugh 29. Sie hat 1190 in Badenoch, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1254 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah FitzHugh è nata il circa 1167 nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Fitzhugh, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mrs Fitzhugh, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan nel 1190, nel Badenoch, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1254, nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah FitzHughが約1167年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父Fitzhughは33歳，母Mrs Fitzhughは29歳であった。1190年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドバデノチでWilliam Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1254年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで89歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1167년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fitzhugh(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Fitzhugh(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드 바데노치에서 William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1254년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1167, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fitzhugh, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Fitzhugh, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan em 1190, em Badenoch, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1254, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah FitzHugh родилась около 1167 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Fitzhugh было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Fitzhugh, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan в 1190 г. в местности баденох, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1254 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

sm.about 1167–about 1254: e tusa o le 1167–e tusa o le 1254

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1167, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Fitzhugh, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs Fitzhugh, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan en 1190, en Badenoch, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1254, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Inverness-shire, Scotland.
